messages.content: Check the current balance for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"get_balance","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Return current balance and outstanding charges for a subscriber.

messages.content: Add DATA30 to verified customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"add_data_package","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","package_code":"DATA30"}}}

tools.name: add_data_package
tools.description: Add a one-time data package to an active subscriber.

messages.content: Move verified customer C001 from PLUS to 5G_MAX.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"change_plan","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","new_plan":"5G_MAX"}}}

tools.name: change_plan
tools.description: Move an active subscriber to a new mobile plan.

messages.content: Check usage for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"get_usage","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Return current data and voice usage for a subscriber.

messages.content: Show profile summary for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"get_customer_profile","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: get_customer_profile
tools.description: Return non-sensitive customer profile fields.

messages.content: What is the current plan of customer C003?
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"get_current_plan","arguments":{"customer_id":"C003"}}}

tools.name: get_current_plan
tools.description: Return the active mobile plan for a subscriber.

messages.content: Check network status in HN01 for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"check_network_status","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","area_code":"HN01"}}}

tools.name: check_network_status
tools.description: Return network incident status for an area.

messages.content: List available plans for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"list_available_plans","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: list_available_plans
tools.description: List currently available telco plans.

messages.content: Send an SMS OTP to customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"send_otp","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","channel":"sms"}}}

tools.name: send_otp
tools.description: Send a one-time password to verify a subscriber.

messages.content: Verify OTP 123456 for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"verify_otp","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","otp":"123456"}}}

tools.name: verify_otp
tools.description: Verify an OTP submitted by the customer.

messages.content: Record a 10000 payment for suspended customer C002.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"pay_bill","arguments":{"customer_id":"C002","amount":10000}}}

tools.name: pay_bill
tools.description: Record a customer bill payment.

messages.content: Resume suspended postpaid customer C005 after balance is cleared.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"resume_line","arguments":{"customer_id":"C005"}}}

tools.name: resume_line
tools.description: Reactivate a suspended subscriber line.

{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"replace_sim","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","sim_type":"physical"}}}

tools.name: replace_sim
tools.description: Queue a SIM replacement request.

messages.content: Disable roaming for customer C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"disable_roaming","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: disable_roaming
tools.description: Disable international roaming for a subscriber.

messages.content: Open a normal network support ticket for C001.
{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"open_support_ticket","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","category":"network"}}}

tools.name: open_support_ticket
tools.description: Open a support ticket for a customer issue.

{"action":"call_function","call":{"tool_name":"block_premium_sms","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}}

tools.name: block_premium_sms
tools.description: Block premium SMS services for a subscriber.

{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["reason"]}

tools.name: suspend_line
tools.description: Temporarily suspend an active subscriber line.

messages.content: Open a support ticket for C001, but the category is omitted.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["category"]}

tools.name: open_support_ticket
tools.description: Open a support ticket for a customer issue.

messages.content: Check network status for C001 in unsupported area HUE01.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["area_code"]}

tools.name: check_network_status
tools.description: Return network incident status for an area.

messages.content: Pay a bill for C001 with amount written as ten thousand instead of a number.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["amount"]}

tools.name: pay_bill
tools.description: Record a customer bill payment.

messages.content: Check the balance for customer C123, but this customer id may be mistyped.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["customer_id"]}

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Return current balance and outstanding charges for a subscriber.

messages.content: Show usage for unknown customer C999.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["customer_id"]}

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Return current data and voice usage for a subscriber.

messages.content: Report lost SIM for C001, then replace it with a physical SIM.
{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"report_lost_sim","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}},{"tool_name":"replace_sim","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","sim_type":"physical"}}]}

tools.description: Queue a SIM replacement request.

tools.name: report_lost_sim
tools.description: Record a lost SIM report for a verified subscriber.

{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"send_otp","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","channel":"sms"}},{"tool_name":"verify_otp","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","otp":"123456"}}]}

tools.name: send_otp
tools.description: Send a one-time password to verify a subscriber.

tools.name: verify_otp
tools.description: Verify an OTP submitted by the customer.

messages.content: C001 lost the SIM; report the loss and prepare an eSIM replacement.
{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"report_lost_sim","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}},{"tool_name":"replace_sim","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","sim_type":"esim"}}]}

tools.name: replace_sim
tools.description: Queue a SIM replacement request.

tools.name: report_lost_sim
tools.description: Record a lost SIM report for a verified subscriber.

messages.content: Check both balance and usage for C001.
{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"get_balance","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}},{"tool_name":"get_usage","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}}]}

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Return current balance and outstanding charges for a subscriber.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Return current data and voice usage for a subscriber.

messages.content: Show profile and current plan for C003.
{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"get_customer_profile","arguments":{"customer_id":"C003"}},{"tool_name":"get_current_plan","arguments":{"customer_id":"C003"}}]}

tools.name: get_current_plan
tools.description: Return the active mobile plan for a subscriber.

tools.name: get_customer_profile
tools.description: Return non-sensitive customer profile fields.

messages.content: Check balance for C001 and network status in HN01.
{"action":"call_functions","calls":[{"tool_name":"get_balance","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001"}},{"tool_name":"check_network_status","arguments":{"customer_id":"C001","area_code":"HN01"}}]}

tools.name: check_network_status
tools.description: Return network incident status for an area.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Return current balance and outstanding charges for a subscriber.

messages.content: Resume suspended customer C002 even though the outstanding balance is not cleared.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"line resume requires zero outstanding balance; do not call balance or resume tools"}

tools.name: resume_line
tools.description: Reactivate a suspended subscriber line.

messages.content: Replace C003 with a physical SIM before any lost SIM report exists.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"SIM replacement requires a prior lost SIM report; do not create a compensating tool sequence"}

tools.name: replace_sim
tools.description: Queue a SIM replacement request.

messages.content: Cancel suspended customer C002 while an outstanding balance remains.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"cancellation requires an active subscriber with zero outstanding balance"}

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel an active subscription after all charges are cleared.

messages.content: Register autopay for prepaid customer C003.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"autopay is only allowed for eligible postpaid subscribers"}

tools.name: register_autopay
tools.description: Register autopay for a postpaid customer.

messages.content: Add DATA10 to suspended customer C002.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"data packages require an active subscriber"}

tools.name: add_data_package
tools.description: Add a one-time data package to an active subscriber.

messages.content: Enable roaming in Japan for prepaid customer C003.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"roaming activation requires an eligible postpaid subscriber"}

tools.name: enable_roaming
tools.description: Enable international roaming for an eligible subscriber.

messages.content: Suspend line C001 before identity verification has completed.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"identity verification is required before sensitive line suspension"}

tools.name: suspend_line
tools.description: Temporarily suspend an active subscriber line.

messages.content: Increase the credit limit for C001 before identity verification.
{"action":"abstain","reason":"credit limit changes require verified customer identity"}

tools.name: increase_credit_limit
tools.description: Increase a postpaid customer's credit limit.

messages.content: Add a data package for customer C001, but no package is specified.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["package_code"]}

tools.name: add_data_package
tools.description: Add a one-time data package to an active subscriber.

messages.content: Add DATA999 to customer C001.
{"action":"ask_clarification","asked_slots":["package_code"]}

tools.name: add_data_package
tools.description: Add a one-time data package to an active subscriber.
